name: APH ParlInfo Search
description: The Parliament of Australia's comprehensive search engine — covering Hansard, bills, committee reports, tabled papers, and member information. The most powerful research tool for Australian political professionals.
whyUseIt: ParlInfo is the definitive search tool for Australian parliamentary information. It lets you search across all parliamentary records simultaneously — finding every mention of an issue, tracking a bill's progress, or compiling a complete record of what a politician has said.
marketerWorkflow: Search for all references to your policy issue across Hansard, committee reports, and bills. Track the legislative history of related measures. Compile a briefing note for your member.
managerExpects: Staff who can produce comprehensive parliamentary research on any topic within hours, not days

vocabulary.definition: A document formally presented to parliament — reports, treaties, regulations
The findings and recommendations of a parliamentary committee inquiry

beginnerMistakes: Using only keyword search when ParlInfo's advanced filters (date range, document type, speaker) produce much better results
Not checking committee reports — they often contain the most detailed analysis on any political issue
